About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an extremely dominant performance by AGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 96.4 out of 100—a near-perfect momentum signal across all timeframes. AGX has delivered extraordinary returns, posting 1,900.54% over 10 years, 1,220.16% over 5 years, and 336.73% over 1 year, while substantially outpacing both SPY and QQQ benchmarks by 1,656.63% and 1,397.07% respectively over the decade. The ticker passes all four momentum ratio thresholds, trades above all major moving averages, and shows a "clean" momentum signal with normal volatility, triggering a "strong_buy" flag. In stark contrast, CVE demonstrates a deteriorating long-term pattern despite strong recent momentum: while it excels in 1-year (141.25%) and 5-year (289.87%) returns, its 10-year return of only 99.59% lags severely, and it underperforms SPY by 144.32% and QQQ by 403.88% over the full decade, suggesting this energy sector play has failed to sustain secular momentum compared to broader indices.
